variation.description: Configure the type, content and media of this message variation.

variation.hint: Each variation can have its own type (text, image, video, etc.). One will be randomly chosen for each recipient.

broadcasts.fileDragDrop: Drag the file here or click to select

sources.noConnectedInstances: No connected instances. Connect at least one instance before creating the campaign.
sources.noListsCreated: No lists created. Create a contact list first.

config.delayDescription: Wait interval between each sent message. Higher values reduce the risk of blocking.
config.scheduleActiveDesc: The campaign will start automatically at the configured date/time (in the tenant timezone).
config.scheduleEmptyDesc: Leave empty to start immediately after creation.
